homepage.heroSubline: Durable fences built to withstand Ohio's toughest weather. Serving Cleveland and surrounding areas.
homepage.aboutTitle: Built on Strength, Rooted in Cleveland
aboutText: Acme Fence has been securing Cleveland homes and businesses for over a decade. We started as a small, family-run operation and have grown into a trusted name in the community, all while maintaining our commitment to quality craftsmanship.

Our approach is simple: We listen to your needs, provide expert advice, and deliver a fence that exceeds your expectations. We use only the highest-quality materials and employ skilled installers who take pride in their work. We understand the unique challenges of Cleveland's climate and build fences designed to last.

We're proud to be a part of the Cleveland community. We source our materials locally whenever possible and support local initiatives. When you choose Acme Fence, you're not just getting a fence; you're investing in your community.

valueProps.title: Built to Last
valueProps.description: Fences engineered to withstand Cleveland's harsh winters and humid summers.

valueProps.title: Local Expertise

valueProps.title: Professional Installation
valueProps.description: Skilled crews ensure precise installation and long-term performance.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your fencing project.

services.name: Wood Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Classic wood fences, expertly installed for lasting beauty and security.
services.description:
We build wood fences for Cleveland homes with an understanding of the local climate and landscape. From the selection of rot-resistant lumber to precise post setting that can withstand the freeze-thaw cycle, we ensure a wood fence that lasts. Our wood fence options include classic picket fences, privacy fences, and decorative designs to complement your home's style. We handle everything from initial site evaluation to final cleanup, ensuring a seamless and stress-free experience. We take extra care to properly treat the wood against moisture and insect damage, extending the life of your fence for years to come. We also offer staining and painting services to customize your fence to your exact specifications.

Our team takes pride in crafting wood fences that not only enhance the beauty of your property but also provide reliable security and privacy. We use only the highest-quality materials and employ proven construction techniques to deliver a fence that will stand the test of time. We understand that a wood fence is an investment, and we're committed to providing you with a fence that you'll be proud of for years to come.

faq.question: What type of wood is best for fences in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Cedar and treated lumber are excellent choices due to their natural resistance to rot and insects, crucial for Cleveland's climate.

faq.question: How long will a wood fence last?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a well-built wood fence in Cleveland can last 15-20 years or more.

faq.question: Do I need a permit to build a fence in Cleveland?
faq.answer: Yes, a permit is typically required. We can handle the permitting process for you as part of our service.

services.name: Vinyl Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Low-maintenance vinyl fences designed for durability and lasting beauty.
services.description:
Vinyl fences are an excellent choice for Cleveland homeowners seeking a durable, low-maintenance fencing solution. Resistant to rot, fading, and insect damage, vinyl fences stand up to Cleveland's fluctuating weather conditions. We offer a wide variety of vinyl fence styles, including privacy fences, picket fences, and decorative options to suit any home. Our experienced installers ensure precise installation, providing a fence that will look great and perform flawlessly for years to come. Vinyl fences offer a clean, modern look that complements a variety of architectural styles. 

Unlike wood fences, vinyl fences never need painting or staining, saving you time and money on maintenance. Simply wash them down with soap and water to keep them looking their best. We use only the highest-quality vinyl materials to ensure long-lasting performance and durability. Our vinyl fences are also backed by a warranty, giving you peace of mind knowing that your investment is protected. We are committed to providing Cleveland homeowners with the best vinyl fence installation services available.

faq.question: How does vinyl fencing hold up in Cleveland's winter weather?
faq.answer: Vinyl is highly resistant to cracking and warping in cold temperatures, making it an ideal choice for Cleveland winters.

faq.question: What colors and styles are available for vinyl fences?
faq.answer: We offer a wide range of colors and styles to match your home's aesthetic, from classic white to natural wood tones.

faq.question: Does vinyl fencing require any special cleaning?
faq.answer: No, vinyl fencing is easy to clean with soap and water. It doesn't require any painting or staining.

services.name: Aluminum Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Elegant and secure aluminum fences for pools, yards, and decorative borders.
services.description:
Aluminum fences offer a stylish and secure fencing solution for Cleveland properties. Ideal for pool enclosures, yard boundaries, and decorative borders, aluminum fences provide a sleek, modern look while requiring minimal maintenance. Our aluminum fences are powder-coated for long-lasting durability and resistance to rust and corrosion, making them perfect for Cleveland's lakefront environment. We offer a variety of styles and colors to complement your home's architecture. 

Our experienced installers ensure precise and secure installation, providing a fence that will enhance the beauty and security of your property. Aluminum fences are also a popular choice for commercial properties due to their durability and low maintenance requirements. We offer a range of commercial-grade aluminum fences to meet the specific needs of your business. We understand that security is a top priority, and we're committed to providing Cleveland businesses with the best aluminum fence installation services available.

faq.question: Are aluminum fences suitable for Cleveland's lakefront environment?
faq.answer: Yes, aluminum fences are highly resistant to rust and corrosion, making them ideal for Cleveland's lakefront properties.

faq.question: Can I customize the height and style of my aluminum fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a wide range of customizable options to meet your specific needs and preferences.

faq.question: Do aluminum fences require any maintenance?
faq.answer: Aluminum fences require minimal maintenance. Simply wash them down with soap and water to keep them looking their best.

services.name: Chain-Link Fence Installation
services.shortDescription: Affordable and practical chain-link fences for security and boundary definition.
services.description:
Chain-link fences are a cost-effective and practical fencing solution for Cleveland homes and businesses. Providing security and boundary definition, chain-link fences are ideal for a variety of applications. We offer a range of chain-link fence options, including galvanized steel and vinyl-coated finishes for added durability and weather resistance. Our experienced installers ensure secure and proper installation, providing a fence that will stand the test of time. Chain-link fences are a versatile option that can be used for residential, commercial, and industrial properties. 

We understand that budget is a consideration, and we're committed to providing Cleveland customers with the most affordable chain-link fence installation services available. We also offer a variety of accessories, such as gates and privacy slats, to customize your chain-link fence to your specific needs. Our team is dedicated to providing excellent customer service and ensuring that you are completely satisfied with your new chain-link fence. We are proud to be a trusted provider of chain-link fence installation services in Cleveland.

faq.question: Are chain-link fences a good option for security?
faq.answer: Yes, chain-link fences provide a strong deterrent against unauthorized access and are a cost-effective security solution.

faq.question: Can I add privacy to a chain-link fence?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer privacy slats that can be easily installed to enhance the privacy of your chain-link fence.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of a chain-link fence?
faq.answer: With proper maintenance, a chain-link fence can last for 20 years or more.

services.name: Fence Repair & Maintenance
services.shortDescription: Extending the life of your fence with expert repair and maintenance services.
services.description:
Cleveland's harsh winters and humid summers can take a toll on fences. Acme Fence offers comprehensive fence repair and maintenance services to keep your fence looking its best and functioning properly. We handle everything from repairing damaged posts and panels to replacing broken gates and hardware. We understand the importance of maintaining your fence to protect your investment. Our experienced technicians are skilled in repairing all types of fences, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and chain-link. We use only the highest-quality materials for repairs, ensuring long-lasting results. 

Regular maintenance can prevent costly repairs down the road. We offer routine maintenance services such as cleaning, staining, and sealing to protect your fence from the elements. We also offer emergency repair services for storm damage or other unexpected events. Our goal is to provide Cleveland homeowners and businesses with reliable and affordable fence repair and maintenance services. We are committed to extending the life of your fence and ensuring that it continues to provide security and beauty for years to come.

faq.question: How often should I maintain my fence in Cleveland?
faq.answer: We recommend inspecting your fence at least once a year and performing any necessary repairs or maintenance as needed.

faq.question: What are the signs that my fence needs repair?
faq.answer: Common signs include leaning posts, cracked or broken panels, and loose hardware.

faq.question: Can you repair fences damaged by snow or ice?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience repairing fences damaged by Cleveland's harsh winter weather.

services.name: Gate Installation & Repair
services.shortDescription: Secure and stylish gates expertly installed and repaired for seamless access.
services.description:
A properly functioning gate is essential for security and convenience. Acme Fence offers comprehensive gate installation and repair services for Cleveland properties. We install and repair all types of gates, including wood, vinyl, aluminum, and chain-link. Our experienced technicians ensure precise installation and smooth operation. We offer a variety of gate styles to complement your fence and enhance your property's curb appeal. We also offer custom gate designs to meet your specific needs and preferences. 

Whether you need a new gate installed or an existing gate repaired, we have the expertise to get the job done right. We use only the highest-quality materials and hardware to ensure long-lasting performance. We also offer gate automation services, including the installation of gate openers and access control systems. Our goal is to provide Cleveland homeowners and businesses with reliable and affordable gate installation and repair services. We are committed to ensuring that your gate provides security, convenience, and lasting beauty.

faq.question: What type of gate is best for my property?
faq.answer: The best type of gate depends on your specific needs and preferences, as well as the style of your fence and property.

faq.question: Can you automate my existing gate?
faq.answer: Yes, we can add gate openers and access control systems to most existing gates.

faq.question: How much does gate repair cost?
faq.answer: The cost of gate repair depends on the extent of the damage and the type of gate. We offer free estimates.

reviews.name: Maria S.
reviews.text: Acme Fence did a fantastic job installing our new wood privacy fence. The crew was professional, efficient, and respectful of our property. The fence looks beautiful and provides the privacy we were looking for. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: We needed a chain-link fence installed quickly for our dog. Acme Fence provided a competitive quote and completed the installation within a week. The fence is sturdy and keeps our furry friend safe.

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: After a bad storm, part of our vinyl fence was damaged. Acme Fence came out quickly and repaired the fence seamlessly. You can't even tell there was any damage. Great service!

reviews.name: Tom B.
reviews.text: Acme Fence installed an aluminum fence around our pool. The fence is beautiful and meets all safety requirements. The installation team was professional and knowledgeable. We are very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Our gate was sticking and difficult to open. Acme Fence repaired the gate quickly and efficiently. It now opens and closes smoothly. Thank you!

reviews.name: Michael P.
reviews.text: Acme Fence stained our existing wood fence and it looks brand new! The color is perfect and the application was flawless. They really know what they're doing.
